features.name: initial_block_with_blocking_assignment_to_register
features.description: Code should include a register declaration with an initial block using blocking assignment, followed by a clocked always block with non-blocking assignments

features.name: nonblocking_assignment_to_register_with_init_attribute
features.description: Code should include a register that has an init attribute from an initial blocking assignment, followed by non-blocking assignments in an always block
